channel.title: Garden on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Garden on Nature Works

item.title: Overview of my forest garden design process
item.description:
A bird’s eye view of my approach to designing a forest garden, in the form of a slideshow and screencast

I’ve been asking friends and colleagues for feedback about what would make a good online course for forest gardening. http://localhost:1313/blog/overview-forest-garden-design-process/
